title: Chamguava musarum
taxonomy: Chamguava musarum is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is a member of the genus Chamguava, which is a group of plants that are native to South America. This genus is classified as being part of the subfamily Myrtoideae, which contains plants with similar characteristics to the genus Myrtus. Further classification of Chamguava musarum includes it being part of the order Myrtales and the clade Eurosids II. Overall, the classification of Chamguava musarum reflects its botanical relationships within the plant kingdom.

It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which could contribute to its potential health benefits.
